name: ai-tools
description: Complete 6-phase JS/TS development pipeline for Claude Code — agent-first with skill fallback, schema-validated state, slash commands
author: Yevhen Kondratyev

yk-dev-pipeline.description: Main entry for the 6-phase JS/TS development pipeline. Auto-detects agent availability: hands off to yk-agent-orchestrator when agents are available, runs skill-based pipeline in-place otherwise. Use for ALL development requests: new features, bug fixes, refactoring, debugging, performance, tech debt, 'next step', 'continue', status checks.

yk-agent-orchestrator.description: Agent-first orchestrator (v3.0) — invokes the 7 phase agents via the Task tool, coordinates parallel code review, manages schema-validated pipeline-state.json. Use when the plugin is installed and agents are available. yk-dev-pipeline will hand off to this automatically; invoke directly only when forcing agent mode.

yk-brainstorm.description: Phase 1a: Deep-dive brainstorming for new features/projects. Use ONLY when user explicitly says 'brainstorm' or 'brainstorm phase'. For general 'build me...' or 'new feature' requests, use the yk-dev-pipeline router instead.

yk-investigation.description: Phase 1b: Systematic investigation for bugs and refactoring. Use ONLY when user explicitly says 'investigation phase' or 'investigate this'. For general 'fix this bug' or 'debug this' requests, use the yk-dev-pipeline router instead.

yk-planning.description: Phase 2: Task breakdown and architecture planning. Use ONLY when user explicitly says 'planning phase' AND spec.md exists. For general 'plan this' or 'help me plan' requests, use the yk-dev-pipeline router instead.

yk-implementation.description: Phase 3: Execute plan task by task with quality gates. Use ONLY when user explicitly says 'implementation phase' AND plan.md exists. For general 'build it' or 'start coding' requests, use the yk-dev-pipeline router instead.

yk-code-review.description: Phase 4: Comprehensive 18-area code review. Use when user says 'code review', 'review this code', 'review my code', or 'check my code'. Works standalone on any codebase.

yk-testing.description: Phase 5: Comprehensive test generation (unit, integration, e2e). Use when user says 'write tests', 'add tests', or 'testing phase'. Works standalone on any codebase.

yk-documentation.description: Phase 6: Full project documentation generation. Use when user says 'write docs', 'generate docs', or 'documentation phase'. Works standalone on any codebase.
